mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, model, pinned, created_at, updated_at FROM conversations WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversations (user_id, title, model, pinned) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{model}, #{pinned})
mapper.update: UPDATE conversations SET title = #{title} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE conversations SET pinned = #{pinned} WHERE id = #{id}
